title: Hybrid Marker Selection + Service Selection Polish
summary: Map flow atoms for hospital selection, temporal dead zone fixes, service selection footer refinement, and ambulance heading fixes.

changes.message: Implemented hybrid marker selection using map flow atoms (mapSelectedHospitalIdAtom, mapFeaturedHospitalAtom) for ephemeral UI state that survives sheet collapse.
Fixed temporal dead zone error with discoveredHospitals by moving selectHospitalForMap definition after useMapDerivedData.
Fixed temporal dead zone error with openHospitalDetail by reordering hooks and removing prop dependency from useMapHospitalSelection.
Added user location marker tap handler (onUserLocationPress) to trigger location sheet phase.
Fixed duplicate hospital lookup in selectHospitalForMap by caching result in variable.
Refined service selection footer CTA row layout and copy for better visual hierarchy and clarity.
Fixed ambulance tracking initial heading display to show correct direction on load.
Fixed ambulance preview heading fallback when heading data is unavailable.
Themed map canvas handoff surfaces for consistent dark/light mode support.
Refined LocationSheet mode ownership so search, saved-place, and success states use the correct sheet header and snap behavior.
Fixed selected-location decision flow so save success can return with the fresh saved address instead of stale candidate data.
Added a focused post-save state with clear 'Use As Pickup' and 'Done' actions after saving Home, Work, or other places.
Updated nearby hospital hero card copy with a compact 'Browse' action and lighter typography for better scan balance.
Introduced fade-end clipping for dense hospital titles so long names no longer rely on visible ellipsis.
Applied the same fade-end clipping treatment to the expanded pickup location chrome address.
Documented the iVisit fade-end text rule and pending global FadeEndText / ClippedTextFade pass.
Preserved recent LocationSheet fixes for manual entry access, recents empty state, keyboard handling, and mode transitions.
Carries forward recent map stability fixes for hospital preservation, sheet snap transitions, ambulance sprite orientation, and marker guards.
